description_long: This is a tall, ornate candelabrum with a sturdy, round metal base and a long, vertical wooden stem. At the top, three candle holders branch out symmetrically from a central metal support, each designed to hold a single candle. The metal components have a weathered, dark patina, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, while the wooden shaft shows a natural, slightly worn finish. The base is wide and heavy, providing stability for the entire structure. The candle holders are cup-shaped and appear to be made of the same metal as the arms, with no visible candles or flames present. This object is reminiscent of classic street or park candelabra, often found in historical urban settings or decorative outdoor environments.
description: A tall, vintage-style metal and wood candelabrum with three candle holders branching from a central stem and a wide, round base. The metal is dark and weathered, and the wooden shaft is natural and slightly worn.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candle holders branching symmetrically from the central stem, with the full round base visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the candelabrum, with only one candle holder clearly visible and the others aligned behind.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three candle holders and the round base, but with subtle differences in the metal's patina.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the candelabrum's thin profile and a single candle holder in focus.
attribute_holder_type: ornate metal and wood candelabrum base
